title: Genomic analysis of enterovirus D68, including one strain isolated from a child with Wilson's disease in Taiwan.
author_string: Chien, Yeh-Sheng, Luo, Shu-Ting, Tsao, Kuo-Chien, Wang, Ying-Hsiang, Lin, Tzou-Yien et al.
journal_full: Journal of the Formosan Medical Association = Taiwan yi zhi
abstract: North America experienced life-threatening outbreaks of enterovirus D68 (EV-D68) in 2014. We retrospectively detected EV-D68 from a child with Wilson's disease in 2008 in Taiwan. After comparing this EV-D68/Taiwan/2008 strain with EV-D68 genomes obtained from the public domain, it was classified as genome type 1-B; it is phylogenetically related to the predominant EV-D68 viruses that circulated in 2009 in Vietnam. It is necessary to strengthen EV-D68 detection globally, including in children with acute liver failure. Moreover, harmonization of genomic analysis of EV-D68 is desirable to understand global evolution of EV-D68.
